_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the execute-non-query-failures playbook (Branch 2: unsafe SQL construction / parameter mapping). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key c7a8b9d0-1e2f-4a3b-8c4d-6e7f80910203 --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs d8b9c0e1-2f3a-4b4c-9d5e-7f8091020304 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
